child_node.description: Node id to run per item via Send.

item_key.description: State key the item is written to for each child.

index_key.description: Key each child receives its 0-based input index under (also gets _fanout_total), so results can be reordered deterministically despite parallel completion order.

on_item_error.description: fail: one item's error aborts the whole batch (default). skip: isolate it - log and drop that item's contribution, keep the rest. (Also enabled by workflow error_policy 'continue'.)

item_timeout_seconds.description: Optional per-item timeout. Applies to async children / subgraphs (sync children can't be preempted). A timed-out item follows on_item_error.
